queries.question: Which country singers play guitar and which bluegrass singers play the same instrument?
queries.sql:
SELECT Songs.song_title 
FROM Musicians JOIN MusicianInstrument ON Musicians.id = MusicianInstrument.musician_id JOIN Instruments ON MusicianInstrument.instrument_id = Instruments.id JOIN Albums ON Albums.artist_id = Musicians.id JOIN SongAlbum ON SongAlbum.album_id = Albums.id JOIN Songs ON Songs.id = SongAlbum.song_id
WHERE Musicians.musician_type = "Country Singer" AND Instruments.instrument_name = "Guitar"
UNION
SELECT Songs.song_title 
FROM Musicians JOIN MusicianInstrument ON Musicians.id = MusicianInstrument.musician_id JOIN Instruments ON MusicianInstrument.instrument_id = Instruments.id JOIN Albums ON Albums.artist_id = Musicians.id JOIN SongAlbum ON SongAlbum.album_id = Albums.id JOIN Songs ON Songs.id = SongAlbum.song_id
WHERE Musicians.musician_type = "Bluegrass Singer" AND Instruments.instrument_name = "Guitar"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?musicians a :Musician .
    ?musicianinstrument a :MusicianInstrument .
    ?musicianinstrument p:hasMusicians ?musicians .
    ?instruments a :Instrument .
    ?musicianinstrument p:hasInstruments ?instruments .
    ?albums a :Album .
    ?albums p:hasMusicians ?musicians .
    ?songalbum a :SongAlbum .
    ?songalbum p:hasAlbums ?albums .
    ?songs a :Song .
    ?songalbum p:hasSongs ?songs .
    ?songs p:song_title ?song_title .
    ?musicians p:musician_type ?musician_type_f .
    ?instruments p:instrument_name ?instrument_name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?musician_type_f) = "Country Singer")
    FILTER(STR(?instrument_name_f) = "Guitar")
    BIND(?song_title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?musicians a :Musician .
    ?musicianinstrument a :MusicianInstrument .
    ?musicianinstrument p:hasMusicians ?musicians .
    ?instruments a :Instrument .
    ?musicianinstrument p:hasInstruments ?instruments .
    ?albums a :Album .
    ?albums p:hasMusicians ?musicians .
    ?songalbum a :SongAlbum .
    ?songalbum p:hasAlbums ?albums .
    ?songs a :Song .
    ?songalbum p:hasSongs ?songs .
    ?songs p:song_title ?song_title .
    ?musicians p:musician_type ?musician_type_f .
    ?instruments p:instrument_name ?instrument_name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?musician_type_f) = "Bluegrass Singer")
    FILTER(STR(?instrument_name_f) = "Guitar")
    BIND(?song_title AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Provide a list of all country singers and also provide a list of bluegrass singers with a guitar.
queries.sql:
SELECT Songs.song_title 
FROM Songs JOIN SongAlbum ON Songs.id = SongAlbum.song_id JOIN Albums ON SongAlbum.album_id = Albums.id JOIN Musicians ON Albums.artist_id = Musicians.id WHERE Musicians.musician_type = "Country Singer"
UNION
SELECT Songs.song_title 
FROM Musicians JOIN MusicianInstrument ON Musicians.id = MusicianInstrument.musician_id JOIN Instruments ON MusicianInstrument.instrument_id = Instruments.id JOIN Albums ON Albums.artist_id = Musicians.id JOIN SongAlbum ON SongAlbum.album_id = Albums.id JOIN Songs ON Songs.id = SongAlbum.song_id
WHERE Musicians.musician_type = "Bluegrass Singer" AND Instruments.instrument_name = "Guitar"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?songs a :Song .
    ?songalbum a :SongAlbum .
    ?songalbum p:hasSongs ?songs .
    ?albums a :Album .
    ?songalbum p:hasAlbums ?albums .
    ?musicians a :Musician .
    ?albums p:hasMusicians ?musicians .
    ?songs p:song_title ?song_title .
    ?musicians p:musician_type ?musician_type_f .
    FILTER(STR(?musician_type_f) = "Country Singer")
    BIND(?song_title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?musicians a :Musician .
    ?musicianinstrument a :MusicianInstrument .
    ?musicianinstrument p:hasMusicians ?musicians .
    ?instruments a :Instrument .
    ?musicianinstrument p:hasInstruments ?instruments .
    ?albums a :Album .
    ?albums p:hasMusicians ?musicians .
    ?songalbum a :SongAlbum .
    ?songalbum p:hasAlbums ?albums .
    ?songs a :Song .
    ?songalbum p:hasSongs ?songs .
    ?songs p:song_title ?song_title .
    ?musicians p:musician_type ?musician_type_f .
    ?instruments p:instrument_name ?instrument_name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?musician_type_f) = "Bluegrass Singer")
    FILTER(STR(?instrument_name_f) = "Guitar")
    BIND(?song_title AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me country singers and bluegrass singers with a guitar.

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?musicians a :Musician .
    ?musicianinstrument a :MusicianInstrument .
    ?musicianinstrument p:hasMusicians ?musicians .
    ?instruments a :Instrument .

    FILTER(STR(?musician_type_f) = "Country Singer")
    FILTER(STR(?instrument_name_f) = "Guitar")

  UNION
  {
    ?musicians a :Musician .
    ?musicianinstrument a :MusicianInstrument .
    ?musicianinstrument p:hasMusicians ?musicians .
    ?instruments a :Instrument .
    ?musicianinstrument p:hasInstruments ?instruments .
    ?albums a :Album .
    ?albums p:hasMusicians ?musicians .
    ?songalbum a :SongAlbum .
    ?songalbum p:hasAlbums ?albums .
    ?songs a :Song .
    ?songalbum p:hasSongs ?songs .

    ?musicians p:musician_type ?musician_type_f .

    FILTER(STR(?musician_type_f) = "Bluegrass Singer")
    FILTER(STR(?instrument_name_f) = "Guitar")

} }
  low: { SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?songs a :Song .
    ?songalbum a :SongAlbum .
    ?songalbum p:hasSongs ?songs .
    ?albums a :Album .
    ?songalbum p:hasAlbums ?albums .
    ?musicians a :Musician .
    ?albums p:hasMusicians ?musicians .
    ?songs p:song_title ?song_title .
    ?musicians p:musician_type ?musician_type_f .
    FILTER(STR(?musician_type_f) = "Country Singer")
    BIND(?song_title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?musicians a :Musician .
    ?musicianinstrument a :MusicianInstrument .
    ?musicianinstrument p:hasMusicians ?musicians .
    ?instruments a :Instrument .
    ?musicianinstrument p:hasInstruments ?instruments .
    ?albums a :Album .
    ?albums p:hasMusicians ?musicians .
    ?songalbum a :SongAlbum .
    ?songalbum p:hasAlbums ?albums .
    ?songs a :Song .
    ?songalbum p:hasSongs ?songs .
    ?songs p:song_title ?song_title .
    ?musicians p:musician_type ?musician_type_f .
    ?instruments p:instrument_name ?instrument_name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?musician_type_f) = "Bluegrass Singer")
    FILTER(STR(?instrument_name_f) = "Guitar")
    BIND(?song_title AS ?o0)
  }
} }
}
